title: phlox drummondii var. glabriflora
intro: Phlox drummondii var. glabriflora, also known as Annual Phlox, is a type of flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its delicate pink, purple, or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Phlox drummondii var. glabriflora include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and soothing respiratory issues. Phlox drummondii var. glabriflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural healers.
